entries.definition:
كتاب الهمزة

أون - أوه

(أوه) الهمزة والواو والهاء كلمةٌ ليست أصلاً يقاس عليها. يقال تأَوّه إذا قال أَوَّهْ وأَوْهِ والعرب تقول ذلك. قال:

إذا ما قمتُ أَرْحُلُها بِلَيلٍ

تأَوَّهُ آهَة الرَّجُلِ الحَزِينِ

* آلُ عِمْرَانَ name of Sura 3, a Medinan sura, so-named for the mention of ʿimrān in verse 33 2 people (3:11) كَدَأْبِ ءَالِ فِرْعَوْنَ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا like [the case of] Pharaoh’s people and their predecessors [who] denied Our revelations.
أَوَّل ʾawwal [quasi-act. part.; fem. أُولَى ʾūlā; pl. أَوَّلُون ʾawwalūn] 1 first (3:96) إِنَّ أَوَّلَ بَيْتٍ وُضِعَ لِلنَّاسِ لَلَّذِى بِبَكَّةَ the first House [of worship] to be established for people was the one at Mecca; *(57:3) الأَوَّلُ [an attribute of God] the First, the Beginning; *(53:25) الآخِرَةَ وَالأُولَى the next and this life 2 previous, former, earlier (20:21) قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا الأُولَىٰ He said, ‘Take it and do not be afraid–We will restore it to its former state’ 3 previous generations [الأَوَّلُون al-ʾawwalūn] people of old times (17:59) وَمَا مَنَعَنَآ أَن نُّرْسِلَ بِٱلْءَايَٰتِ إِلَّآ أَن كَذَّبَ بِهَا الأَوَّلُونَ nothing prevents Us from sending signs, except that previous generations denied them.

أُولَاء ʾulāʾi (see ذا dhā).

أُولَات ʾulāt classified by grammarians as quasi-sound fem. pl. (ملحق بجمع المؤنث) on the basis of similarity in the way in which both are declined; أُولات occurs twice in the Qurʾan and is always in a construct with a following noun, ‘those with …’, ‘those endowed with …’, ‘possessors of …’ *:(65:4) وَأُولَٰتُ ٱلْأَحْمَالِ those with child, pregnant women. أُولات has no phonetically related singular; the role, however, is fulfilled by ذات dhāt (q.v.) (see أُولُو ʾulū).

أُولُو ʾulū (in the accusative (النصب) and genitive (الجر > أُولِي) classified by grammarians as a quasi-sound masc. pl. (ملحق بجمع المذكر السالم) on the basis of similarity in the way in which they are declined; أُولُو occurs 43 times in the Qurʾan and is always in a construct with a following noun, ‘those with …’, ‘those endowed with …’, ‘possessors of …’ (39:21) إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُولِى الأَلْبَابِ there is truly a reminder in this for those possessed of minds. أُولُو has no phonetically related singular; the role, however, is fulfilled by ذُو dhū (q.v.) (see أُولات ʾulāt).
entries.definition_english:

entries.definition:
ʾ–w–h measles; pain, sadness; to moan, to sigh. Of this root, أَوَّاه ʾawwāh
66
